offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Timely generation of tax withholding reports for payroll compliance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
